rulings.Case Title: MINAKO TOGASHI VS. CHRISTINE ELI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees [Ccp 425.16]
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 5, 2008 LINE 3. CROSS-DEFENDANT MINAKO TOGASHI'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees [C.C.P. SECTION 425.16] IS GRANTED AWARDING PLAINTIFF $28,416.82. THE LODESTAR IS MORE THAN REASONABLE AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SOUGHT TO RECOVER FOR CERTAIN TIME SPENT, THEREBY NEGATING THE CLAIM THAT PLAINTIFF'S LAWYERS WERE INEFFICIENT. =(302/PJM/X-CL)

rulings.Case Title: TOM GONZALES VS. FRANCHISE TAX BOARD, AN AGENCY OF THE STATE OF
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Leave To File Compulsory Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 5, 2008 LINE 5. DEFENDANT FRANCHISE TAX BOARD'S, AN AGENCY OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, Motion For Leave To File Compulsory Cross-Complaint IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT DEFENDANT ENGAGED IN BAD FAITH. PROBATE CODE SECTION 9201 GOVERNS CLAIMS BY PUBLIC ENTITIES AND SPECIFIES THAT REVENUE TAX CODE SECTION 19517 APPLIES TO THE TIMELINESS OF CLAIMS. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS TIMELY. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS, BASED ON THE MERITS, MAY BE RESOLVED IN THE COURSE OF LITIGATION. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND STEFFEN VS. ROBERT HUBERMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Special Mtn To Strike Complaint For Malicious Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 5, 2008 LINE 11. DEFENDANT ROBERT HUBERMAN'S Special MOTION To Strike Complaint For Malicious Prosecution IS GRANTED. THE CENTRAL ISSUE IS PROBABLE CAUSE BY WELCH TO SEEK DAMAGES UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 3346. THE COURT FINDS THAT A REASONABLE ATTORNEY WOULD FIND THAT SECTION 3346 WOULD SUPPORT A CLAIM FOR DAMAGES TO THE VINES AND THE TREE LIMB ON THE WELCH PROPERTY. THIS CONCLUSION IS SUPPORTED BY THE DECSION IN HENINGER V DUNN (1980) 101 CAL APP 3D 858, 866. FOR THAT REASON, STEFFEN CANNOT ESTABLISH PROBABLE CAUSE. STEFFEN'S OBJECTIONS TO THE WELCH AND WIEGEL DECLARATIONS ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/AY)
